Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words
Senneer thaana senneer thaana
sendhey neeril sen paadhi kanneer thaana
Niyayam thaana niyayam thaana
or aezhaikku kai kooli kaayam thaana

aandaikku oru paadhi aavi pochey
attaikku sari paadhi ratham pochey
enga melu kaalu verum thozha pochey
adhu kankaani cheruppuku thodhaa pochey (..Senneer thaana)

Ye oosi mazhaye oosi mazhaye
enga udalodu uyir soodu aththu pochey
ye oodhak kaathey oodhak kaathey
enga poorveega porvayum pothup pochey

Dhegathil ulla elumbukku
oru veri naayum theru naayum modhudhey
Vaanathil vazhum nenjamo
thanmaanathai thaaraamal odudhey

Oorellaam vittu nam yelama kettu
naam veliyaanom poonaiku vaaka pattu
oru maanam kettu siru soru thinbom
pei mazhaiyodum paniyodum thookangettu

Paambuku pasi vandhadhey
oru siru kozhi ennaagum kootile
Yaanaiyin perungaalile
siru kalaangal enaagum kaatile
Iva uyir kaatha oru sothum pariponadhey

Senneer thaana senneer thaana
sendhey neeril sen paadhi kanneer thaana

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Senneer Thaana'?

The song conveys themes of love and longing, expressing deep emotional sentiments through its lyrics.

How does 'Senneer Thaana' fit into the plot of the movie 'Paradesi'?

This song plays a crucial role in illustrating the romantic journey of the characters, enhancing the emotional narrative of the film.

Who are the singers of 'Senneer Thaana'?

The song features the talented voices of Gangai Amaren and Priya Himesh.

Who composed the music for 'Senneer Thaana'?

The music for this beautiful track was composed by GV Prakash.

When was 'Senneer Thaana' released?

The song was released on November 25, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Senneer Thaana, the emotional depth of love is beautifully portrayed through the heartfelt lyrics penned by Vairamuthu. The song serves as a poignant backdrop in Paradesi, reflecting the struggles and aspirations of the characters. With its soothing melody and captivating duet, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and longing. The collaboration between Gangai Amaren and Priya Himesh, under GV Prakash's musical direction, creates an unforgettable listening experience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Senneer Thaana from Paradesi is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Gangai Amaren and Priya Himesh, paired with GV Prakash's soulful composition, this song resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the magic of Vairamuthu's poignant lyrics that elevate the emotional depth of this cinematic gem.
stanzaMeanings: The water is flowing, the water is flowing, in the evening water, half of the tears are flowing. Is it justice? Is it justice? For one burden, there is a fee to be paid.
Half of the soul has gone to that place, half of the blood has spilled. Our legs are just for worship, that has gone to the eyes of the beholder.
Oh, the rain is falling, the rain is falling, it has taken away the life from our bodies. Oh, the wind is blowing, the wind is blowing, our past has been lost.
Inside the body, there is a fierce dog and a street dog. The heart that lives in the sky is running without dignity.
Everyone in the village has left, we are all together, we will go outside. For the journey, we will sing a song, we will eat a little food, with the rain and the mist, we will rest.
The snake has come hungry, a small chicken will be in the group. In the elephant's herd, small sounds will be in the sky.
She is not saving life, it is a waste of time.
The water is flowing, the water is flowing, in the evening water, half of the tears are flowing. Is it justice? Is it justice? For one burden, there is a fee to be paid.
Half of the soul has gone to that place, half of the blood has spilled. Our legs are just for worship, that has gone to the eyes of the beholder.
